title: First Post
paragraphs: It's been a long time coming! I always wanted to have a music blog, so I made my dreams come true. Allow me to put you on to something. I will backlog a bunch of posts from this year, then I will regularly add a post every week. In addition to that, I will do album reviews and talk about songs old and new.

Over the years, I have been given so many nicknames in the music space. I am frequently referred  to as 'Human Shazam', 'The Embodiment of a Recommendation  Algorithm (TEoaRA), 'Golden Ears', etc. I am beyond excited to share what I listen to.
I appreciate anyone who stopped by, so I will leave you with one of my favorite quotes: "Thank y’all for taking on this ride with me. You know what? Here go two more for y’all." -Lebron James
